assertions.description: All 17 REST endpoints exist and return correct status codes
assertions.details: All endpoint tests pass in api.test.ts and api-layer.test.ts

assertions.description: All endpoints validate request bodies with Zod schemas
assertions.details: Empty body → 400 for chat, courses, subscription

assertions.description: All endpoints return typed responses matching expected shape
assertions.details: courses returns {courses:[]}, analytics returns expected fields

assertions.description: WebSocket connects and receives response.start event
WebSocket emits agent.spawned and agent.complete events
assertions.details: Both lifecycle events confirmed in WS test

assertions.description: Rate limiter: free tier blocked after 100 req/min
Rate limiter: pro tier allowed up to 500 req/min
All endpoints require auth (except register/login/marketplace browse)
OpenAPI spec exists and is valid
assertions.details: openapi.yaml contains openapi: 3.0 and all endpoints

assertions.description: Average response time <200ms for simple GET
assertions.details: In-memory DB, all responses well under 200ms
WS server accepts and handles connections

assertions.description: Full API flow: register → login → create course → get lessons
assertions.details: Chained test passes in both test files

command_run: npx vitest run && npx tsc --noEmit && npx eslint .
